Notes: Single UPDATE contains two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/TTL/rdata. The test checks whether the server treats the duplicate as harmless de-duplication, as an error, or in a way that affects the stored RRset.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR for dup.campus.edu. twice in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset exists and, if so, whether it is present exactly once after the UPDATE.
